block_00: The Final Trading Battle will show! 💪
block_03: Once you survived all four rounds of the Asia Trading Cup it's time to roll up your sleeves and pack a lunch because we will be taking the meaning of trading to a whole new level. Starting next week, the final match of bulls against bears begins. Real traders will have a chance to make a name for themselves by winning the title of №1 trader in Asia.
block_04: The Final Trading Battle begins in a few days, on July 27 — those who enter the top-10 traders of the tournament table will get a share of the $5000 cash prize to their accounts. The higher the trader's position in the leaderboard, the bigger the prize!
block_05: Ready to go head to head with the best?
block_11: $50 or a ticket won in previous tournaments
block_15: Part of your payment during the tournament will go to the prize pool. All participating traders will start the tournament with a special account. The balance credited varies by tournament.
block_16: *One will get a share of the prize fund only in case of winning the tournament.
